name: Thoma Bravo
hq: Chicago, IL / Miami, FL / San Francisco, CA
overview: Software-specialist buyout firm and one of the largest dedicated software investors in the world. Multiple fund strategies covering large-cap buyouts (flagship), middle-market (Discover), and smaller / earlier-stage (Explore). Known for take-privates, carve-outs, and operational levers around go-to-market and product strategy.
notable: Long history of carve-outs and take-privates of public software companies
Featured WSP case study: Thoma Bravo / Blue Coat (2011)
bdNotes: Has a developed BD/origination team; refresh to pull current named contacts before outreach.
